cnbc.title: U.S. military begins strikes on 'multiple targets' in Iran at Trump's direction
cnbc.summary: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.

cnbc.title: Oracle beats on earnings, but stock drops on plans to raise another $20 billion
cnbc.summary: Oracle topped quarterly expectations, but free cash flow is negative, and the company plans to raise more capital for data center projects.

cnbc.title: Analysis: Trump said he loves inflation. Why that should be music to Kevin Warsh's ears
cnbc.summary: The president said Wednesday he is happy with inflation at 4.2%. That will be welcome news for new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh.

cnbc.title: Trump keeps saying an Iran deal is close. Markets keep believing it
cnbc.summary: Analysts still assume that, despite the continued conflict, a deal will eventually be reached that ends the war and reopens the Strait of Hormuz.

cnbc.title: Trump says 'I love the inflation' after consumer price index hits 3-year high
cnbc.summary: President Trump suggested that inflation would drop when the U.S. war against Iran ends, and said, "We've been taking out millions of barrels of oil."

cnbc.title: USDA's Rollins called screwworm a 'little pest' amid U.S. spread. Last year, she called it 'terrifying'
cnbc.summary: The U.S. agriculture secretary is downplaying the threat posed by the spreading screwworm now compared with her more dire remarks last year.

cnbc.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says U.S. will attack Iran 'very hard'
cnbc.summary: Oil prices rose after the U.S. launched military strikes against Iran, raising concerns that renewed clashes may threaten shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

cnbc.title: Wall Street needs a crash course in the token economy ahead of AI IPOs. SpaceX offers a preview
cnbc.summary: When OpenAI and Anthropic make their IPO prospectuses available to the public, investors are going to have to learn about a whole new economy.

cnbc.title: Trump says U.S. secretly moved more than 100 million barrels of oil through Strait of Hormuz
cnbc.summary: Trump's comments come after Energy Secretary Chris Wright said Tuesday that oil exports through Hormuz are "rising very meaningfully."

cnbc.title: College sticker prices top $100,000 at 16 schools — but many students pay significantly less
